title: Video Manifest Entry
description: Schema for a single video entry in data/manifest.json. Describes the video-specific shape after the native-video-playback migration.

lat.description: Latitude of the video's capture location

lng.description: Longitude of the video's capture location

url.description: Local path to the source video file relative to the project root

thumbnail.description: Firebase Storage URL for the video's poster frame (still image extracted from video)

caption.description: Caption text for the video (may be empty)

tags.description: Array of tags associated with the video

google_photos_url.description: Original Google Drive view URL, retained for reference

web_url.description: Direct Firebase Storage streaming URL for the 720p MP4 variant. Must be a publicly accessible, streamable MP4 URL (not a Google Drive preview URL).

web_url_full.description: Direct Firebase Storage streaming URL for the full-resolution MP4 variant. Optional but expected for all processed videos. If absent, the quality toggle in the viewer is hidden.

type.description: Media type discriminator, always 'video' for video entries
